recent_calls.summary: David called to request plumbing service for water coming through the roof vent in the master bathroom, preferring the service to be scheduled for tomorrow. The agent confirmed the details, corrected the phone number, noted David's interest in home maintenance programs, and arranged for the team to follow up about a missing email. David provided positive feedback about the interaction before ending the call.

David reported water coming through the vent in his master bathroom, which he believes is a plumbing emergency. The agent documented the issue, flagged it as an emergency, and informed David that the team will contact him on the next business day since it was after hours. The call ended with no further requests from David.

Arthur called to report that his air conditioner has no power and requested urgent service. The agent confirmed the service details, updated the contact number to Arthur's work phone, and scheduled a follow-up for the next business day after 6 AM. Arthur confirmed he is already on a maintenance plan and agreed to provide feedback after the repair.

The user called to confirm that their online form was received. The agent acknowledged the confirmation and assured the user that the team would follow up on the next business day. The call ended politely with no further requests.

The user called to inquire about the installation year of a system installed by Budget at a specific address. The agent explained that they could not access installation records after hours but offered to take the user's contact information for a callback. The user provided their name and phone number, and the agent confirmed the request would be passed to the team for follow-up on the next business day.

Larry returned a call regarding an issue with his cooling system, which is blowing warm air instead of cooling properly. He scheduled a regular service appointment for Monday morning, and requested information about home maintenance programs. The agent confirmed the details and collected positive feedback from Larry.

The user, Lanny, called to request urgent service for an air conditioner that is not cooling at a new address in Saint Louis. The agent confirmed the details, documented the issue, and informed Lanny that a live representative or technician could not be dispatched immediately due to after-hours, but the team will follow up on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

David reported water coming in through a bathroom vent after rain and expressed concern it might happen again. He requested a follow-up on the next business day, preferably Monday, for a plumbing issue. The agent confirmed contact details and service address, and the call concluded with the agent assuring a team follow-up.
The call was very brief and the user hung up immediately after the agent introduced herself. No conversation or assistance took place.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer.

Shelby from American Home Shield called to report an emergency air conditioning issue at 121 Emmerling Drive, Saint Louis, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details and attempted to transfer the call to an emergency specialist, but no live representative was available. The agent assured Shelby that the issue was escalated and an emergency specialist would call back immediately.
The user called and requested to speak to an agent. The initial agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called and requested to speak with someone. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called Budget and was initially connected to an assistant named Sophie. The user requested customer service, and Sophie transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Duane called to request a technician to check his AC unit, which is cooling but not enough and may need Freon. The agent confirmed Duane's details and booked an appointment for Monday, July 13th at 8 AM. Duane was informed about the standard dispatch fee and the team will confirm the exact time shortly.

Julie Davis called to schedule a service appointment for her air conditioner that is not cooling. The agent confirmed the service address and booked an appointment for Tuesday, July 7th at 10 AM. The user was informed about the dispatch fee and told to call if there are any changes.

The user, Keith, called Budget but was unsure about the purpose of the call. The agent, Sophie, attempted to connect him with a live agent and successfully transferred the call. No further conversation took place after the transfer.

The user called to schedule an appointment for an AC unit inspection related to a home warranty. The agent confirmed the service details, including the address, issue, and dispatch number, and the user requested the first available appointment. The call ended with the agent confirming the information and the user declining to provide feedback.

The user called to request urgent air conditioning service for their parents' home due to extreme heat. The agent gathered all necessary information and attempted to schedule a service appointment, but the user expressed that the available times were too late. The call ended with the agent transferring the user to a live agent for immediate assistance.

The user mistakenly called Budget instead of Polaris Law Group seeking to reschedule an appointment with an attorney named Amanda. The agent clarified that they are not a law office and offered assistance with home services, but the user decided to call back Polaris Law Group later. The call ended without any service request or further action.

Elesia called to report an emergency with her air conditioning system, which is not cooling the house despite the attic space being cool. The agent documented the issue, flagged it as an emergency, and informed her that the team will follow up on the next business day. Elesia provided her contact details and service address, and the call ended with the agent assuring a prompt callback.

Denise Jackson called about an urgent E8 error on her air conditioning unit, emphasizing the need for prompt service due to her husband's emphysema COPD. The agent confirmed no immediate danger such as a gas leak and escalated the request for priority service on the next business day. The call ended with the agent assuring Denise that the team will contact her soon.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and the user hanging up immediately without any interaction.

The user called to report an urgent issue of no cooling in the house but confirmed no immediate help was needed. The agent acknowledged the urgency and assured the user that the team would address it on the next business day, then requested the user's full name.

John called to schedule a routine seasonal heating and cooling checkup for his home at 55 Oak Ridge Drive. The agent confirmed his preferences, booked an appointment for Wednesday, July 8th at 2 PM, and received positive feedback from John about the prompt and quick scheduling process.

John called to report that his AC is not draining and water is pooling around the unit shortly after a recent service visit. The agent confirmed his contact details and service address, acknowledged the issue, and assured that the team would be notified. The call ended with no further requests from John.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live representative. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.
The user called and requested to speak with a live agent. The initial agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested.
The user called Budget and was greeted by the agent Sophie. The user pressed 0 to be connected to a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another number.
The user called and requested to speak with Shannon. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and was immediately transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.

The user called Budget and was immediately transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation before the transfer.

The user, Sylvester, called and requested to speak with Daniel, the owner. The agent attempted to connect the user to Daniel and successfully transferred the call. No further conversation took place after the transfer.

The call was very brief and disconnected quickly, with the user speaking unintelligibly and the agent attempting to identify the user. The call ended as voicemail was reached without any meaningful interaction.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the user made an unclear statement. The agent attempted to greet the user but the call was disconnected shortly after.

Patricia called to report that her air conditioner was not working and needed immediate repair. The agent scheduled a service appointment for Monday, July 6th at 2 PM, as no same-day slots were available. Patricia was satisfied with the service and provided positive feedback.

The user called to report an issue with an estimate that would not open. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to report an issue with opening an estimate sent to them. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended after the transfer was successful.
The user called and requested to speak with someone. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

Andy Mayer called to arrange an estimate for a new air conditioning and furnace at his home in Saint Louis, Missouri. The agent booked an appointment for Monday, July 6th, between 4 and 6 PM, but Andy expressed dissatisfaction with the service, particularly about unanswered questions, and rated the experience a 2 out of 5. The call ended with the agent transferring Andy to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called and requested to speak with someone. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
No conversation happened.
The user called Budget and requested to speak with someone. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Emmanuel Gully called to inquire about scheduling service for his AC unit at 12 Drone Drive. The agent confirmed his contact details but found no appointment on file and offered to transfer him to a live representative, which Emmanuel accepted. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
